assertions.value: Displays an ASCII art banner for the dock skill before doing anything else

name: detection-awareness
prompt: /dock for a Node.js Express app with an existing GitHub Actions workflow

assertions.value: Describes detecting or scanning the codebase for language, framework, existing CI configuration
Mentions Node.js or Express as the detected stack
Explains or implements the build-once-promote-everywhere philosophy where images are built once and promoted through environments without rebuilding
Mentions tagging images with git SHA or version for immutability

name: multi-platform-support
prompt: /dock I want to deploy to Azure Container Apps for prod and Dokku for dev

assertions.value: Supports different deployment targets per environment
References both Azure Container Apps and Dokku as deployment platforms
